en: There are five people in our family.
There are three brothers and sisters in our family.

ch: 我們一家人生活在一起。
en: I live with my father, mother, brother and sister.

ab: madaqvas sa tama nak, kisacu’ a tama nak.
ch: 我的爸爸很高，我的爸爸是警察。
en: My father is tall and he is a policeman.

ab: makuis sa tina nak, ising nga tina nak.
ch: 我的媽媽很瘦，我的媽媽是醫生。
en: My mother is thin and my mom is a doctor.

ab: malasbunun na tama nam han lumaq bazbaz zami.
ch: 爸爸在家會和我們說族語。
en: My father speaks the Bunun language with us at home.
We will all go back to the tribe during the summer vacation.

ab: muskun cak masitoqas nak madamu opop.
ch: 我和兄姊會一起抓青蛙。
en: My brothers and sisters and I will catch frogs together.
I like our family very much.
